title: Control and Monitor the Use of VoIP Technologies
description: Control and monitor the use of Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) technologies.

checks.name: VoIP Usage Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify a documented policy identifies authorized VoIP technologies, usage restrictions, and monitoring requirements â€” policy review only

checks.name: SIP/VoIP Ports Controlled by Firewall
checks.purpose: Verify SIP ports (5060, 5061) are either not open or governed by explicit Windows Firewall rules to ensure only authorized VoIP traffic is permitted

checks.name: VoIP Traffic Monitored
checks.purpose: Verify VoIP communications are logged and monitored per the organizational security monitoring program â€” requires manual verification

checks.name: VoIP Usage Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify a documented policy identifies authorized VoIP technologies and usage controls â€” policy review only

checks.name: SIP/VoIP Ports Controlled by Firewall
checks.purpose: Verify SIP ports 5060/5061 are controlled by firewall rules on the server to restrict unauthorized VoIP sessions

checks.name: VoIP Traffic Monitored
checks.purpose: Verify VoIP communications are logged and subject to security monitoring on the server â€” requires manual verification

checks.name: Unauthorized VoIP Applications Blocked
checks.purpose: Verify application control policies block unauthorized VoIP clients â€” requires AppLocker/WDAC policy review

checks.name: VoIP Usage Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify a documented policy governs VoIP use including authorized technologies and monitoring â€” policy review only

checks.name: SIP/VoIP Ports Not Unexpectedly Open
checks.purpose: Verify SIP ports 5060/5061 are not unexpectedly listening, or are controlled by iptables/firewalld rules to restrict unauthorized VoIP sessions

checks.name: VoIP Traffic Monitored
checks.purpose: Verify VoIP communications are subject to security monitoring and logging â€” requires manual verification

checks.name: VoIP Usage Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify a documented policy governs VoIP use including authorized technologies and monitoring â€” policy review only

checks.name: SIP/VoIP Ports Not Unexpectedly Open
checks.purpose: Verify SIP ports 5060/5061 are not unexpectedly listening, or are controlled by iptables/firewalld rules to restrict unauthorized VoIP sessions

checks.name: VoIP Traffic Monitored
checks.purpose: Verify VoIP communications are subject to security monitoring and logging â€” requires manual verification

remediation: Document a VoIP usage policy identifying authorized applications and monitoring requirements. Configure Windows Firewall rules to control SIP ports 5060/5061. Use AppLocker to allow only approved VoIP clients. On Linux, configure iptables/firewalld rules to restrict SIP ports to authorized sources only.
